assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets Authentication.CookieLifetime to 8 hours and CookieSlidingExpiration to false
assertions.rationale: Cookie lifetime configuration is known ASP.NET Core knowledge
ExpiredSessionsTriggerBackchannelLogout is a specific IdentityServer option not in general knowledge

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: AddServerSideSessions() is somewhat known from Duende docs

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to a valid HTTPS URL
assertions.rationale: BackChannelLogoutUri is a known OIDC concept
CoordinateClientLifetimesWithUserSession is a specific Duende option not in general knowledge
